projects.title: Orbit Ball
projects.description: Orbit Ball Android is a Unity-based mobile game that challenges players to navigate a planet through space by rotating their phone, shooting through celestial orbits, and entering a portal to advance to the next level.

projects.category: Object Detection Solution for Trash Segregation
projects.title: Circular AI
projects.description: The CircularAI project involved training a Single Shot Detector model using TensorFlow on the TACO dataset to classify waste into 5 distinct categories. Through iteration and hyperparameter tuning, the model's accuracy was improved. The project successfully integrated the model into an Android app using TFLite Model Maker and TFLite Task Library for efficient waste classification.
